summary: Iteration 17: Tested mobile horizontal scroll, section visibility system, and media URL resolution. All backend APIs pass (11/11). Frontend features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 17 are working: 1) Mobile horizontal scroll containers found on /sauny page (special-offer-mobile-scroll, advantages-mobile-scroll, video-reviews-mobile-scroll, reviews-mobile-scroll). 2) Section visibility API (GET/PUT /api/settings/visibility) working correctly. 3) Admin panel visibility tabs working for both Saunas (САУНЫ -> Видимость) and Balia (КУПЕЛИ -> Контент -> Видимость sub-tab). 4) Media URLs using relative paths (/api/images/xxx, /api/videos/xxx) are correctly resolved by resolveMediaUrl helper. Hero backgrounds and videos load correctly on /sauny and /balie pages.

mobile_horizontal_scroll.details: All 4 mobile scroll containers found: special-offer-mobile-scroll, advantages-mobile-scroll, video-reviews-mobile-scroll, reviews-mobile-scroll

section_visibility_api.details: GET /api/settings/visibility returns sauna and balia visibility. PUT /api/admin/settings/visibility saves settings correctly with auth.

admin_sauna_visibility.details: САУНЫ -> Видимость tab shows all 17 sections with Desktop/Mobile toggles and Save button

admin_balia_visibility.details: КУПЕЛИ -> Контент -> Видимость sub-tab shows all 15 balia sections with Desktop/Mobile toggles and Save button

media_url_resolution.details: resolveMediaUrl helper correctly prepends REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to relative URLs. Verified on /sauny Hero (background image), /balie Hero (video: /api/videos/5af6c2ef-6e89-4b9d-8369-041e071ea74e.mp4), and main landing page images.

hero_backgrounds.details: /sauny Hero loads with sauna interior background. /balie Hero loads with video background showing hot tub in mountain setting.
